channel.title: Redis :: Tag :: Tuan Dat | Cloud & Backend Developer

item.title: IELTS Helper — AI-Powered IELTS Preparation Platform
item.description: A full-stack web application for IELTS Reading & Writing practice with AI-powered essay scoring, real-time feedback, classroom management, and role-based dashboards. Built with Next.js 16, NestJS 10, PostgreSQL, BullMQ, and OpenAI/Gemini.
